textByHashes.950771d107b9caf36b50b39abd131991bd957a59: I'm not helping you fix that, as if it hasn't caused enough trouble as it is. Your friends have already tried every torture in the book! I'm still not telling anyone squat.
textByHashes.3b169b8bab1fd84f13464ea73111ae11b540c597: That's all I've been living on since I got here.
textByHashes.902c601d98c4db40e515b27c74400256377fb892: Yes, yes and yes. Tried them all, quite liked the toe nibbling.
textByHashes.32b08553aab5abf0da9982b20fbde3bc01c2bccf: Us gnomes aren't wise so we don't get them. Face it, you'll never put me in enough pain that I'll tell you what you wanna know. I used to play gnomeball as a kid. This is a walk in the park in comparison.
textByHashes.21b75fd0103f1a5911e39ce68651f6cd9ae5a1ca: Ha! You think I'm stupid enough to tell you that I've been craving toad crunchies or that I can't stand having my feet tickled!
textByHashes.69bf0374dc646442a277d03df9d9a58251ab8334: I did? What did I say?
textByHashes.e7284fec2f54fb41d9df07e5f88babdb8dcf4cf7: Yes yes!! That was it, I'd hate that. Please don't do that. By Guthix's beard you mourners are such idiots! Leave me be moron.
textByHashes.0a9fecb6e8ae05bb6231623563e27b5fe16486f4: I used to play gnomeball yes.... what's that got to do with anything? Nothing that can convince me to help you that's for sure. Go away imbecile.
textByHashes.f997cff3a644428a17b95aa5ad38eeea1ad522ec: Oops... I mean erm... No that must have been some other err... gnome...
textByHashes.114b61d0764067071c8830e6c480c7ec8c1b023a: If you think you can just buy my co-operation you're a bigger imbecile than I thought.
textByHashes.2f1f2c6ee48440e945852634a79931d6d0b2dc9e: Oooh... a big scary gnomeball. I mean, it might crush me and my entire family, because we're so small!! They have big teeth and everything don't they? Sheesh. You mourners will have to try better than that. Now go away. I need some sleep after all these [sigh] scary threats.
textByHashes.2218729bbea23cfe80b7f3589b6a7280aef4f8f7: No... I said being here is a walk in the park. Where do they get you guys? You must all be Ogre rejects for being too thick. Leave me be idiot.
textByHashes.368cf461ee7314c785ab1f8053a0f765464e6110: Alright... alright! I'm beaten! Bring me some soft leather and some magic logs and I'll see what I can do.
textByHashes.3588ba71d9b4d2489fa75f78669939d43b734ddf: Well let me up off of this rack and I'll get started, I can't do anything while I'm all tied up.
textByHashes.f0120b481eaaca0d7b4dfadc65f7b644cb2072f3: Well when you have it all I'll fix that thing, but please don't tickle me any more.
textByHashes.b55372cd18603a167bab241bbbb2a4dadceb4a12: I told you, I'm not going to get anything out of helping you, am I? As I figure, that device is the only thing keeping me out of the slave pens, where I'd get fed worse than nail and prune stew!
textByHashes.81e9d71d6d7a4092c6ae8b538f6219d506f41207: Oi! There's no need for that, I already agreed to help.
textByHashes.08354c15c683bed9d5ff190e45cd8041c6c6bb36: Ho ho ho... no more... Teehee... please stop... Hoohoo... he he he... I hate you!
